title: Tokyo-Style Plantain Patties
description: A fusion twist on traditional patties, with the sweetness of plantains and a hint of Japanese flavor.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
2. In a shallow dish, whisk together soy sauce and 1 tbsp water.
3. Add sliced plantains to the marinade and let sit for 10 minutes.
4. Cook patties in the pan according to package instructions.
5. Add plantains to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until caramelized.
6. Assemble plantain patties by placing a cooked patty on a plate, topping with a cooked plantain slice, and repeating.
7. Sprinkle with cheese, green onions, and sesame seeds.
